/usr/local/bin/arm-none-eabi-gcc -g -nostartfiles -mthumb -mcpu=cortex-m7 -mfloat-abi=hard -mfpu=fpv5-sp-d16 -D__FPU_USED=1 -T/Users/pomettini/Developer/PlaydateSDK/C_API/buildsupport/link_map.ld -Wl,-Map=game.map,--cref,--gc-sections,--no-warn-mismatch,--emit-relocs --entry eventHandlerShim --specs=nosys.specs -O3 -flto CMakeFiles/PokeMini_DEVICE.dir/PokeMini_Playdate.c.obj
